mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supplier WHERE type = #{type} AND state = '1'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier (name, address, contact, tele, email, type, state) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{contact}, #{tele}, #{email}, #{type}, '1')
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier SET state = '0' WHERE suid = #{suid}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier WHERE type = #{type} AND state = '1'
SELECT * FROM supplier WHERE name = #{name} AND type = #{type} AND state = '1'
